rationale: Keep: the citing note says it extends prior TV advertising–search–sales work by modeling online search as a mediator and decomposing direct vs. indirect ad effects, which directly aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution (joint sales+search decomposition and changed elasticity inference). Both papers are in the U.S. auto context and link TV ad spend, Google Trends search, and sales, and the match is an exact DOI citation (10.1509/jmr.12.0215), indicating likely substantive use rather than a generic mention.
